description: Defines named Sanguo governance harness run profiles without changing legacy CLI defaults.

profiles.name: default
profiles.label: Legacy-compatible default
profiles.description: Do not enable extra strict gates unless CLI flags are passed.

profiles.name: strict-local
profiles.label: Strict local governance check
profiles.description: Enable all current deterministic strict checks for local handoff.

profiles.name: release-gate
profiles.label: Release gate governance check
profiles.description: Same strict checks as strict-local, intended for release readiness review.
